\tzpentry{ID5501}{Document Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5501 introduces Document Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \kappa_k = k\pi,\qquad k\in\Z_{>0}. \label{eq:pi_ladder} \end{equation}
